title: Fix admin blog table display, add blog categories page, fix infinite pagination
description:
Four frontend issues across blog admin and public blog.

## Issue 1 — Admin blog table not displaying posts

File: /Users/meteo/Documents/WWW/site-builder/frontend/pages/admin/blog/index.vue

The page EXISTS and has a table. The call is:
`useApi<any>('/blog/posts', { params: { limit: 100 } })`

Problem: this endpoint returns paginated data with `{ items, next_cursor, total }` but the component uses `posts?.items`. Verify the actual API response shape matches. The endpoint `/blog/posts` uses cursor pagination, not `limit` param — the backend uses `per_page` not `limit`. Fix the param name.

Also add `status: 'all'` or admin token awareness — without auth token, `/blog/posts` only returns published posts, so drafts are hidden. The admin page should show ALL posts including drafts.

Fix: change params to `{ per_page: 100, status: 'all' }` or use the admin endpoint `/admin/blog/posts` if it exists.

After the fix from p28_devops (API base URL fix), the request should start working. But also check if `useApi` sends auth header — it should if user is logged in as admin.

## Issue 2 — Add Blog Categories admin page

Create: /Users/meteo/Documents/WWW/site-builder/frontend/pages/admin/blog/categories.vue

This page is similar to /Users/meteo/Documents/WWW/site-builder/frontend/pages/admin/products/categories.vue but uses blog categories (GET /api/v1/blog/categories or /api/v1/admin/blog/categories).

The page should:
- List all blog categories with name, slug, post count
- Allow create/edit/delete blog categories via modal
- Use the same UCard + table pattern as products/categories.vue
- Add data-testid attributes per frontend/CLAUDE.md contract
- Use only var(--color-*) tokens

Note: Product categories are in `categories` table, blog categories are in `blog_categories` table — these are DIFFERENT and must be shown separately. Currently admin navigation only shows product categories. Add a link to blog categories in the admin blog section.

## Issue 3 — Admin blog navigation link to categories

Check /Users/meteo/Documents/WWW/site-builder/frontend/layouts/admin.vue or the admin sidebar component — add 'Категории блога' link pointing to /admin/blog/categories.

Find the admin layout/sidebar file and add the navigation item.

## Issue 4 — Public blog pagination stops correctly

File: /Users/meteo/Documents/WWW/site-builder/frontend/pages/blog/index.vue

The pagination logic looks correct in frontend (hasMore = !!next_cursor). After backend fix (p28_backend_blog_categories task), verify that:
- The 'Загрузить ещё' button disappears when hasMore becomes false
- The cursor is correctly passed as `page_cursor` param to useBlog.getPosts()
- No auto-trigger of loadMore (it's a button click, not infinite scroll) — verify there's no IntersectionObserver accidentally triggering auto-load

If there IS an IntersectionObserver for auto-load, ensure it has a proper check: `if (!hasMore.value || loadingMore.value) return`.

Files to modify:
- /Users/meteo/Documents/WWW/site-builder/frontend/pages/admin/blog/index.vue (fix API params, show all posts)
- /Users/meteo/Documents/WWW/site-builder/frontend/pages/admin/blog/categories.vue (CREATE NEW)
- Admin layout/sidebar (add blog categories link)
- /Users/meteo/Documents/WWW/site-builder/frontend/pages/blog/index.vue (verify pagination guard)
- /Users/meteo/Documents/WWW/site-builder/frontend/composables/useBlog.ts (add getCategories if needed)

IMPORTANT: Run `npm run lint` and `npm run type-check` before writing report.
acceptance_criteria: Admin blog page /admin/blog shows ALL posts including drafts
Admin blog page table renders rows correctly (not empty)
Page /admin/blog/categories exists and lists blog categories separately from product categories
Public blog /blog pagination button disappears after last page loaded
No infinite auto-load of blog posts
All new elements have data-testid attributes
